Affiliate Network

Our Trusted Brand Partners

Shop through our affiliate links and we'll earn a small commission — at no extra cost to you. These are brands we genuinely love.

Revenue Model

3 Brilliant Ways We Generate Revenue
Automatically

Our platform is built on three synergistic revenue streams that compound over time.

01
💰
Gift Card Exchange Spread
When users sell unwanted gift cards, we pay out 50% of face value and resell those cards to other users at 85-90% face value. The 35-40% spread is pure margin — automated and instant.
35–40% margin on every exchange
02
🎨
Creator Marketplace Cut
Designers earn 30% royalties on every card sold using their design. We keep the remaining 70%, covering print costs and netting 15-25% profit margin on each physical card sold.
70% platform share on custom cards
03
🔗
Affiliate Commission Engine
Every gift card purchase directs users to partner brand checkout flows. We earn 3-12% affiliate commission on referred purchases plus sponsored placement fees from 200+ brand partners.
3–12% commission per referred sale
